_comment: Acceptance bounds for reproduce.sh. This benchmark measures a fuzzing run,
so exact equality is not reproducible: harness text is LLM-generated and
AFL++ throughput depends on core count and scheduling. What IS reproducible
is the methodology and the shape of the result, so the bounds are set
generously below the observed reference run — a pass means the pipeline
still works end-to-end, not that it produced identical numbers.
selected_target_rationale: the only assertion here that is deterministic: recon ranking is a pure function of the source tree
_max_crashes_note: libnmea has no known memory-safety defect reachable this way. A crash here is a finding to investigate, not a pass — hence the run FAILS so it cannot be ignored.
_require_input_influence_note: the probe binary must produce >1 distinct coverage map across corpus samples. This is the check that would have caught the nmea_load_parsers harness, which compiled, ran, and consumed nothing.
